text: [Music]
finding a t-shirt that fits well can be
tricky here are a few pointers to help
you
out it's important for a t-shirt to fit
well across your shoulders if the seam
drops off the shoulder and sits further
down your arm the t-shirt is probably
too big equally if the seam is sitting
closer to your neck then it's probably
too small you want the seams of the
sleeves to exactly align with where your
shoulder ends
the T-shirt shouldn't be too baggy or
too tight if it's too big it'll drape
and sag which can be
unflattering equally you don't want a
t-shirt so tight that it borders on a
crop top you want the tea to be cut so
it follows the shape and Contours of
your body
[Music]
I
